race.comment: REIGN OF DAME (12) has only been beaten narrowly in her two runs back, finishing with a head of steam here last time over a similar trip. At her top now and looks the one to beat. TROOPER SAM (3) looked destined to break through soon before turning in a poor one last time when well below his best. Was too bad to be true, so willing to give another go. I CAN HELP (2) returns for the Webster yard. Struggled to make an impact in his debut prep but the form around him reads well. Drawn wide for Tilley, watch for him charging late. DRAGON LILLY (5) wasn't far away on debut when sent out at a big price. Deserves more respect this time. Debutant KAIDA ODORI (9) has trialled well and is worth safe-keeping.
